name: Indigo Group S.A.
message: [AI generated] Indigo Group S.A. is a leading company operating in the parking management industry and urban mobility sector. Established in France, it has now expanded globally. The company offers a wide range of services related to parking like car park design, construction, and management. Additionally, it operates in sectors like rentals of shared private cars and two-wheelers. It is also dedicated to the development of digital platforms for parking reservations to ease urban mobility.
